title: Frankfurter Delight
description: A tasty and easy to make hot dog dish. Perfect for a quick snack or meal.

ingredients.name: Delight
ingredients.notes: any type of topping, such as cheese, onions, or chili

ingredients.name: Condiments
ingredients.notes: ketchup, mustard, or any other desired condiments

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cook the Frankfurters according to the package instructions.
While the Frankfurters are cooking, toast the buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the hot dogs by placing a cooked Frankfurter in each bun.
Add desired toppings and condiments to each hot dog.
